verification.description:
Check the latest camera-ready PDF before approving.

Checklist:
- Complies with the JMLR stylefile and JMLR format.
- Matches the accepted paper in content, except for approved minor revisions and camera-ready formatting changes.
- Uses the accepted title and author list.
- Includes all author information in the manuscript.
- Does not render an Editor line in the manuscript header.

revision_comments.description: Required if requesting revision. Explain exactly what the authors must change before camera-ready approval.
